en_title: Under-16s to Be Banned From Social Media, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Says
cn_title: 英首相Starmer宣布将禁止16岁以下使用社交媒体
subtitle: 归还童年
opus_summary: 英国首相Keir Starmer宣布禁止16岁以下青少年使用社交媒体，涵盖TikTok等平台，2027年春季生效。游戏直播亦受限，主机厂商或需调整。

paragraphs.en: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced plans for a social media ban for under-16s. Starmer said the government hopes to pass regulation before Christmas, with the ban coming into effect by spring 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 英国首相Keir Starmer宣布计划禁止16岁以下青少年使用社交媒体。Starmer表示，政府希望在圣诞节前通过相关法规，禁令将于2027年春季生效。

paragraphs.en: The affected platforms include TikTok, Facebook, YouTube, Twitter / X, Snapchat, and Instagram, but not messaging services like WhatsApp or Signal.
paragraphs.cn: 受影响的平台包括TikTok、Facebook、YouTube、Twitter/X、Snapchat和Instagram，但不包括WhatsApp或Signal等即时通讯服务。

paragraphs.en: "A full ban is the right choice... I am not prepared to compromise on the safety and happiness of our children," Starmer told the nation in a televised statement.
paragraphs.cn: 「全面禁令是正确的选择……我不会在孩子们的安全和幸福问题上妥协。」Starmer在全国电视讲话中说道。

paragraphs.en: The government also plans to block livestreaming for under-16s, including on gaming platforms, which suggests Nintendo, Sony, and Microsoft may need to adjust their console policies in the UK. Similarly, the likes of Twitch would theoretically need to adjust policy to ensure compliance, although Starmer's announcement is vague as it relates to video games. Is Discord included in all this? Is Roblox? And how would a ban even work? It's unclear.
paragraphs.cn: 政府还计划禁止16岁以下青少年观看直播，包括游戏平台上的直播。这意味着任天堂、索尼和微软可能需要在英国调整其主机政策。同样，Twitch等平台理论上也需要调整政策以确保合规，不过Starmer在谈及电子游戏时措辞较为模糊。Discord是否包含在内？Roblox呢？而且，禁令究竟如何落地？这些都不明确。

paragraphs.en: The UK social media ban follows a similar ban in Australia, which came into effect in December last year. The policy appears to be spreading globally, with Portugal and Spain potentially bringing in a ban next year. Denmark has set the age of 15 as the bar. Several U.S. states have passed similar laws but they are being challenged in the courts.
paragraphs.cn: 英国此次的社交媒体禁令效仿了澳大利亚于去年12月生效的类似政策。此类政策似乎正在全球范围内蔓延，葡萄牙和西班牙可能于明年引入相关禁令。丹麦已将年龄门槛定为15岁。美国多个州也通过了类似法律，但这些法律正在法庭上受到挑战。

paragraphs.en: “We are banning social media access for under 16s,” Starmer said. “These days kids must find their feet in a world where technology intrudes into every area of their life. I just can’t let that go on anymore. So we’re giving children their childhoods back.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在禁止16岁以下青少年使用社交媒体。」Starmer说道，「如今，孩子们不得不在一个科技渗透到生活方方面面的世界里摸索前行。我不能再让这种情况继续下去了。所以，我们要把童年还给他们。」

paragraphs.en: The government is also looking into enforcing overnight curfews and breaks in infinite scrolling for under-18s. "These restrictions – which together with the ban go further than any other country – will apply to a wider range of online services, including on gaming sites," the government said.
paragraphs.cn: 政府还在考虑对18岁以下用户实施夜间宵禁和无限滚动的休息暂停机制。政府表示：「这些限制——加上禁令，比任何其他国家都更严格——将适用于更广泛的在线服务，包括游戏网站。」

paragraphs.en: "Restrictions on these functionalities will also be on by default for under 16 and 17-year-olds to prevent a cliff-edge at 16. The government will also be looking in more detail at overnight curfews and breaks in infinite scrolling for under-18-year-olds and will set out more detail in July."
paragraphs.cn: 「这些功能的限制也将在16岁和17岁用户中默认开启，以避免在16岁时出现断崖式变化。政府还将更详细地研究对18岁以下用户的夜间宵禁和无限滚动静止休息机制，并将于7月公布更多细节。」

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, a minimum age of 18 will be enforced on "romantic companion" chatbots, designed to simulate sexual relationships or roleplay with users. Other chatbots will need to apply similar restrictions on "intimate functionalities."
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，旨在模拟性关系或与用户进行角色扮演的「浪漫伴侣」聊天机器人，将被强制执行18岁的最低年龄限制。其他聊天机器人也需对「亲密功能」施加类似限制。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。可在X上@wyp100找到他，或通过邮箱wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系，也可通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。

audit_issues.detail: source contains 'Bloomberg', but required dictionary translation '彭博社' is missing
